description_long: This object is a robust paddle-like tool with a cylindrical, dark metallic head and a rounded, dome-shaped end opposite a flat striking face. The head is attached to a straight, medium-length wooden handle that appears smooth and slightly tapered, with a natural wood grain visible. The metallic head is matte and dark gray, with a small, rectangular marking or logo on the top center. The handle is a rich brown, contrasting with the head, and appears to be securely fitted into the metal. The overall construction suggests durability and ergonomic handling, suitable for repeated striking or pounding tasks. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A sturdy paddle-like tool with a dark metallic head and a smooth wooden handle, featuring a flat and a rounded striking surface. The design is robust and ergonomic, with a matte finish and a small marking on the head.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the cylindrical head and rounded end, with the handle extending downward and the marking on the head visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat striking face on one side of the head and the dome-shaped end on the other, with the full length of the wooden handle visible.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view mirroring the top-down, showing the head's shape and the handle's alignment, with the marking still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the flat and rounded ends of the head and the handle's wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: cylindrical with one flat and one rounded striking face, no visible patterns or cutouts
attribute_brand_logo: small rectangular marking on top center of head, no readable text
